title: Kustomize, Helm 4, Rendering, Validation, Field Ownership, and Promotion · Cluster Case: K8s Render Validate Diff Policy
summary: A platform team copies environment manifests, renders an unreviewed chart, stores credentials in values, and promotes mutable images without diff, ownership, or rollback evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the k8s render validate diff policy increment in rendered environment release package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Render locally, pin dependencies, validate schemas, scan policy, detect removed APIs, diff server defaults, test changed values, and record implementation-specific transfer gates.
Inspect Helm 4 charts, templates, values schema, dependencies, hooks, release state, OCI identity, install, upgrade, rollback, uninstall, and ownership boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example environment overlay drifts from base, Helm values change immutable fields, rendered resources contain a secret, and promotion rebuilds a new image. Render, diff, validate, pin, sign, promote the same artifact, and retain rollback evidence. Competency probe: Render locally, pin dependencies, validate schemas, scan policy, detect removed APIs, diff server defaults, test changed values, and record implementation-specific transfer gates. A defensible solution applies K8s Render Validate Diff Policy, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to rendered environment release package.

content.code:
# Worked focus: k8s-render-validate-diff-policy — Render locally, pin dependencies, validate schemas, scan policy, detect removed APIs, diff server defaults, test changed values, and record implementation-specific transfer gates.
  # Evidence: k8s-worked-k8s-packaging-kustomize-helm-promotion-5
  - competency: k8s-worked-k8s-packaging-kustomize-helm-promotion-5
    artifact: release-package.yaml
    decision: worked k8s packaging kustomize helm promotion 5
    environment: managed canary cluster with provider-specific load balancing
    fault-injection: drop one metrics series during an autoscaling surge
    retained-proof: accessible incident timeline with causal regression evidence
    case-key: worked5
    change: |
      base: reviewed-kubernetes-resources
      overlay: production-patches
      generators: hashed-config-no-secret-output
      helm: 4.2.2-oci-digest-pinned
      render: offline-and-server-validated
      field-manager: platform-reconciler
      promotion: immutable-digest
      rollback: compatibility-tested
    verify: kubectl kustomize overlays/production && helm template status oci://registry.example.test/status --version 1.4.0
    failure: Reject copied manifests, unpinned chart dependencies, secrets in values, render-only confidence, field ownership theft, or Git history as safe rollback proof.
    repair: Compose reviewed bases, render deterministically, validate schemas and policy, diff server behavior, preserve ownership, and promote immutable artifacts.
content.caption: Runnable Kubernetes object and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
